meaning: n.牛津与剑桥两大学,该校之学生或毕业生adj.牛津与剑桥大学的
examples: A "toffs' college" of well-heeled Oxbridge near-misses is a provocative concept.
Serious apprenticeships may look like a good alternative, but more people apply for precious BAE or Rolls-Royce places than for Oxbridge.
We will be returning to the days when some schools encouraged pupils back after A-levels for the so-called "seventh term" entrance exam for Oxbridge.
That, more or less, was the lifestyle of Oxbridge dons for most of the past century.
Also having cut their teeth on Oxbridge satire, the Pythons chose their comic targets more carefully.
